units.source_text: 集團的利潤按不同稅率繳稅，適⽤稅率取決於產⽣利潤的國家／地區。2025年的主要適⽤稅率包括香港（16.5%）、美國（21%）及英國
units.translation_target_text: The group's profits are taxed at different rates, with the applicable rate depending on the country in which the profits are generated. The main applicable tax rates in 2025 include Hong Kong (16.5%), the United States (21%) and the United Kingdom
units.translation_en: The group's profits are taxed at different rates, with the applicable rate depending on the country in which the profits are generated. The main applicable tax rates in 2025 include Hong Kong (16.5%), the United States (21%) and the United Kingdom

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The group's profits are taxed at different rates, with the applicable rate depending on the country in which the profits are generated. The main applicable tax rates in 2025 include Hong Kong (16.5%), the United States (21%) and the United Kingdom

units.source_text: （25%）。倘集團的利潤按產⽣利潤的國家／地區的法定稅率繳稅，則本年度稅率將為21.2%（2024年：21.4%）。
units.translation_target_text: (25%). If the Group's profits were taxed at the statutory rate of the country in which the profits were generated, the tax rate for the year would be 21.2% (2024: 21.4%).
units.translation_en: (25%). If the Group's profits were taxed at the statutory rate of the country in which the profits were generated, the tax rate for the year would be 21.2% (2024: 21.4%).

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: (25%). If the Group's profits were taxed at the statutory rate of the country in which the profits were generated, the tax rate for the year would be 21.2% (2024: 21.4%).

units.source_text: 本年度實質稅率為22.7%，較去年⾼（2024年：22.6%）。本年度實質稅率由於集團在交通銀⾏投資之攤薄虧損及不可扣稅減值⽽增加1.2%、由於
units.translation_target_text: The effective tax rate for this year is 22.7%, which is higher than last year (2024: 22.6%). The effective tax rate for the year increased by 1.2% due to the diluted losses and non-deductible impairment of the Group's investment in Bank of Communications.
units.translation_en: The effective tax rate for this year is 22.7%, which is higher than last year (2024: 22.6%). The effective tax rate for the year increased by 1.2% due to the diluted losses and non-deductible impairment of the Group's investment in Bank of Communications.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The effective tax rate for this year is 22.7%, which is higher than last year (2024: 22.6%). The effective tax rate for the year increased by 1.2% due to the diluted losses and non-deductible impairment of the Group's investment in Bank of Communications.

units.source_text: 未確認遞延稅項變動⽽增加1.0%（主要與法國稅項虧損有關），並因罰款及法律和解開⽀準備之影響（並無錄得稅務利益）⽽增加1.0%。主要由
units.translation_target_text: Unrecognized changes in deferred tax increased by 1.0% (mainly related to French tax losses) and increased by 1.0% due to the impact of provisions for penalties and legal settlement expenses (no tax benefits were recorded). Mainly composed of
units.translation_en: Unrecognized changes in deferred tax increased by 1.0% (mainly related to French tax losses) and increased by 1.0% due to the impact of provisions for penalties and legal settlement expenses (no tax benefits were recorded). Mainly composed of

units.source_text: 於印度和香港對上⼀年的報稅表最終確定，我們對前期數字進⾏調整，本年度實質稅率因⽽降低0.3%。2024年的實質稅率由於出售加拿⼤滙豐產
units.translation_target_text: As the tax returns for the previous year were finalized in India and Hong Kong, we made adjustments to the previous figures, resulting in a 0.3% reduction in the effective tax rate for the year. The effective tax rate in 2024 is due to the sale of HSBC Canada assets
units.translation_en: As the tax returns for the previous year were finalized in India and Hong Kong, we made adjustments to the previous figures, resulting in a 0.3% reduction in the effective tax rate for the year. The effective tax rate in 2024 is due to the sale of HSBC Canada assets

units.source_text: ⽣之非課稅增益⽽減少3.6%、由於出售阿根廷滙豐產⽣之不可扣稅虧損⽽增加4.8%、由於未確認遞延稅項變動（主要與法國稅項虧損有關）⽽增
units.translation_target_text: Decreased 3.6% due to non-taxable gains, increased 4.8% due to non-deductible losses arising from the sale of HSBC Argentina, increased due to unrecognized changes in deferred tax (mainly related to French tax losses)
units.translation_en: Decreased 3.6% due to non-taxable gains, increased 4.8% due to non-deductible losses arising from the sale of HSBC Argentina, increased due to unrecognized changes in deferred tax (mainly related to French tax losses)

units.source_text: 加0.7%，以及由於集團「第⼆⽀柱」全球最低稅項⽀出⽽增加0.7%。
units.translation_target_text: an increase of 0.7%, and an increase of 0.7% due to the group's "second pillar" global minimum tax expense.
units.translation_en: an increase of 0.7%, and an increase of 0.7% due to the group's "second pillar" global minimum tax expense.

units.source_text: 英國採納經合組織稅基侵蝕和利潤轉移(BEPS)包容性框架的「第⼆⽀柱」全球最低稅模型規則，⾃2024年1⽉1⽇起⽣效。多個司法管轄區已採納類
units.translation_target_text: The UK has adopted the "Second Pillar" global minimum tax model rules of the OECD Base Erosion and Profit Shifting (BEPS) Inclusive Framework, effective from January 1, 2024. Several jurisdictions have adopted class
units.translation_en: The UK has adopted the "Second Pillar" global minimum tax model rules of the OECD Base Erosion and Profit Shifting (BEPS) Inclusive Framework, effective from January 1, 2024. Several jurisdictions have adopted class

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The UK has adopted the "Second Pillar" global minimum tax model rules of the OECD Base Erosion and Profit Shifting (BEPS) Inclusive Framework, effective from January 1, 2024. Several jurisdictions have adopted class

units.source_text: 似規則及當地最低稅制度，⾃2025年1⽉1⽇起⽣效，⽽百慕達等若⼲司法管轄區則引入新出台或經修訂的企業所得稅制度，並⾃該⽇期起⽣效。
units.translation_target_text: Similar rules and local minimum tax systems will take effect from January 1, 2025, while certain jurisdictions such as Bermuda have introduced new or revised corporate income tax systems that will take effect from that date.
units.translation_en: Similar rules and local minimum tax systems will take effect from January 1, 2025, while certain jurisdictions such as Bermuda have introduced new or revised corporate income tax systems that will take effect from that date.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Similar rules and local minimum tax systems will take effect from January 1, 2025, while certain jurisdictions such as Bermuda have introduced new or revised corporate income tax systems that will take effect from that date.

units.source_text: 有關變動導致2025年當地的海外稅務負債增加，⽽英國補⾜稅負債則減少。
units.translation_target_text: The changes will result in an increase in local overseas tax liabilities and a decrease in UK top-up tax liabilities in 2025.
units.translation_en: The changes will result in an increase in local overseas tax liabilities and a decrease in UK top-up tax liabilities in 2025.

units.source_text: 就確認遞延稅項資產之判斷⽽⾔，管理層已經評估所有相關資料，包括未來業務利潤預測及符合預測的往績紀錄。管理層對未來可⽤於收回遞延稅
units.translation_target_text: For the purpose of judging the recognition of deferred tax assets, management has evaluated all relevant information, including future business profit forecasts and track record of meeting the forecasts. Management expects deferred taxes to be recovered in the future

units.source_text: 項資產的應課稅利潤的可能性評估，乃基於管理層批准的最近期財務預測，其涵蓋五年期間及按需要外推⾄該期間之後，並已考慮撥回現有應課稅
units.translation_target_text: The assessment of the likelihood of taxable profits on an asset is based on the most recent financial forecast approved by management, which covers a five-year period and extrapolates beyond that period as necessary, taking into account the reversal of existing taxable profits.

units.source_text: 集團的遞延稅項資產淨值為51億美元（2024年：55億美元），包括有關英國業務的遞延稅項資產15億美元（2024年：26億美元）、有關美國業務
units.translation_target_text: The Group's net deferred tax assets are US$5.1 billion (2024: US$5.5 billion), including deferred tax assets of US$1.5 billion (2024: US$2.6 billion) in relation to its UK operations, US$1.5 billion (2024: US$2.6 billion) in relation to its US operations

units.translation_target_text: deferred tax assets of US$2.8 billion (2024: US$3.0 billion), and deferred net assets in France of US$0.8 billion (2024: US$0.5 billion).

units.translation_target_text: France's net deferred tax assets were US$800 million, including US$700 million related to tax losses, the vast majority of which are expected to be recovered within 10 years. units.translation_target_text: If HSBC can control the timing of remittance or other realization of its investments in subsidiaries and branches, and the likelihood of remittance or realization in the foreseeable future is remote, the Group will not recognize deferred payments for these investments.
